full_text:
Shen Yi 申儀
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shen Yi (申儀)was born in Hanzhong. Brother of Shen Dan. Friend of Meng Da. Surrendered from Wei to Shu then again to Wei. Shen Yi was affiliated with Shen Dan, the Wei Kingdom, and the Shu Kingdom.
